## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in UIQA.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm uiqa scan --path ./examples --format markdown`

## Rule Changes

If this adds or changes a rule, include:

- [ ] Bad fixture test
- [ ] Good fixture test
- [ ] `docs/rules.md` update

## Notes

Call out any tradeoffs, known limitations, or follow-up work.
